prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-PROCLEANER-GALLON Product Type: LAUNDRY_DETERGENT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: Gear Aid Revivex Pro Cleaner Gentle Formula Outerwear Repair 1 Gallon Description: Refresh, renew and revive your outerwear with Revivex Pro Cleaner by GEAR AID. This high-tech synthetic fabric wash is designed to clean technical fabrics safely, without leaving behind residues or affecting water repellency. Keep your skiwear, rainwear and waterproof-breathable garments free of dirt and oils, which typically impact fabric performance.

Revivex Pro Cleaner is the first step when treating garments with Revivex Durable Waterproofing or Revivex Wash-In Waterproofing. You can also use it on non-waterproof items, like sleeping bags, gloves, fleece and soft shell garments.

Caring for high-tech fabrics doesn’t have to be scary. And it’s not rocket science. GEAR AID’s Revivex Pro Cleaner makes it as easy as washing your socks.

Gear Aid’s Revivex is the number one choice of top skiwear and outerwear manufacturers. Search Terms: pro cleaner jacket for clothes washer revivex por sleeping bag rain and down concentrate comforter coat Features: - Low sudsing, laundry detergent for high-tech synthetic fabrics, including insulation, soft-shell and GORE-TEX garments - Specialized formula restores breathability, water repellency and warmth to synthetic jackets - Gentle cleaner free of fragrances, softeners and optical brighteners will not leave behind residues or impact breathability - Preps surfaces for Revivex water repellent treatment - Made in USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Gear Aid Revivex Pro Cleaner 1 Gallon

anthropic.title_differentiation: Synthetic Fabric Wash, Low Sudsing, Restores Water Repellency And Breathability, GORE-TEX Safe, Made In USA

openai.title_differentiation: Low Sudsing, Gentle On Technical Fabrics, Restores Breathability, Removes Dirt And Oils, Preps Waterproofing
